_description: Final pricing estimates for Spain vs Belgium QF (2026-07-10, closes 23:00 UTC). Model-only pricing -- no crowd consensus, no Smarkets/market data used, both excluded by explicit instruction. This is a departure from the project's usual RULE1 (avg crowd+market) anchor -- every estimate here is either a direct model output or an explicitly-reasoned judgment call, documented in 03_model_derivations.json and 04_rules_applied.json.

estimates.question: Will Spain advance to the semifinals?
Will the match be tied at halftime?
Will Belgium hold a lead at any point in regulation (excl. shootout)?
Will either team make a substitution at halftime?
Will a goal be scored before the first hydration break?
Will a goal be scored after the second hydration break but before end of regulation?
Will both teams score in regulation?
Will Lamine Yamal score or assist a goal?
Will Kevin De Bruyne have 1+ SOT?
Will a penalty kick be awarded OR a red card be shown?
